label: Transparent blueberry cluster motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Blueberry transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a blueberry cluster motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A compact boreal blueberry cluster with indigo-blue berries, dusty powder bloom, small five-point calyx crowns, sage-green leaves, thin shrub-brown twigs, cream highlight flecks, and cool berry shadows. Botanical accuracy, crisp cutout edges, nutrition-system identity.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include berries, leaves, and twig without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no grapes, no blackberries, no bowl, no spoon, no hand, no forest landscape, no text, no watermark, no loose berry pile dominating.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Blueberry light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive LIGHT MODE design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Blueberry", derived from the transparent blueberry cluster motif already shown in context. This is a source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible compact nutrition UI theme.
Canvas and framing: exact wide landscape 16:9 board, 2560 x 1440 aspect ratio, much wider than tall. Use the full width as a horizontal design-system board. Do not create a square, portrait, poster, vertical sheet, or 3:2 canvas. Keep all text readable at gallery preview size with large labels and short UI copy.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blueberry, Blueberry Cluster, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract colors and interaction language from indigo blueberry skins, dusty powder bloom, sage leaves, cream highlights, shrub-brown twigs, and cool boreal shadows. The board must read as blueberry, not grape, blackberry, or generic blue SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: compact nutrition system, 8px radius, pale cream surfaces, blueberry indigo primary actions, powder-blue muted panels, sage-leaf success and filters, shrub-brown borders, berry-ink text, compact metric cards, subtle powder-bloom and calyx-dot texture.
Constraints: no grape cluster, no blackberry drupelets, no generic blue gradient, no medical sterile UI, no unrelated neon colors, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Blueberry", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Blueberry dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive DARK MODE design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Blueberry" / "Blueberry Cluster". Use the transparent blueberry cluster motif and the light-mode Morphous Blueberry design-system board already shown in context as references. Translate the light board into dark mode; do not invent a new unrelated theme.
Canvas and framing: exact wide landscape 16:9 board, 2560 x 1440 aspect ratio, much wider than tall. Use the full width as a horizontal design-system board. Do not create a square, portrait, poster, vertical sheet, or 3:2 canvas. Keep all text readable at gallery preview size with large labels and short UI copy.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blueberry, Blueberry Cluster, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve blueberry-indigo active states, powder-blue muted accents, sage-leaf status, shrub-brown dark borders, cream text, compact nutrition dashboard rhythm, powder-bloom texture, calyx-dot texture, and 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as blueberry, not grape or generic blue SaaS.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; readable labels such as Geist, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI, 見出し, 本文, ラベル, 数値.
UI coverage: primary/secondary/ghost/destructive buttons, hover/pressed/disabled/loading states, checkbox, radio, switch, input, select, textarea, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, table rows, sidebar navigation, command search palette, empty/loading/error states, progress, stepper, texture samples, radius samples, spacing scale, shadow samples, token code snippets.
Visual details: berry-ink dark backgrounds, shrub-brown cards, pale cream foreground, blueberry-indigo buttons, powder-blue charts, sage status chips, subtle powder-bloom and calyx-dot overlays, crisp compact controls, restrained contrast.
Constraints: no grapes, no blackberries, no wine branding, no neon blue, no pure-black flat background, no generic blue dashboard, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Blueberry".
